public_reputation: Deck-archer hired to keep raiders and extortion crews off lightly armored convoy craft.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Projects readiness without theatricality, as if discipline matters more than spectacle. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a archers still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of archers in and around Nomdara river caravans, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara river caravans workable through the obligations of archers while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must prepare for violence without letting the surrounding institution look openly unstable. Around Nomdara river caravans, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of archers visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kelvi Reedstring needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Nomdara river caravans.
Kelvi Reedstring can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Nomdara river caravans.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Kelvi Reedstring as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara river caravans: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes
